who: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 purchase orders/month
offer: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 purchase orders/month, delayed approvals cause missed deadlines. We send timely reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Contribute to Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM procurement managers with a demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try status tracking for purchase orders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
